title: tax — product analytics
note: Tax carries financial + compliance-critical signals. Its ANALYTICS.json declares product-analytics events that the growth::analytics lane emits about THIS MODULE's admin surfaces (rate CRUD, exemption verification, provider CRUD, calculation drift detection). Tax-lane transactions themselves are financial records — they never flow through the analytics lane.

events.name: Tax Rate Created
events.description: Admin created a new tax rate. percentage_bucket = '0-5' | '5-10' | '10-20' | '20-30' | '30+' (bounded cardinality; raw percentage is confidential per data-classes.json).

events.name: Tax Exemption Expired
events.description: Compliance-relevant — expired exemptions transition to failing verification at calculation time. Consent tier: essential.

events.name: Tax Calculation Completed
events.description: P0 event volume metric — powers provider-health dashboards. tax_amount_cents NEVER on this event (confidential per data-classes.json). Consent tier: essential (financial-audit signal).

events.name: Tax Calculation Failed
events.description: P1 event — every failure blocks an invoice line (fail-safe against under-charging). Consent tier: essential.

events.name: Tax Provider Circuit Breaker Opened
events.description: P1 event — every fire indicates the tenant's tax calculation pipeline is degraded. Consent tier: essential.

events.name: Tax Calculation Drift Detected
events.description: Regulator-critical. ReconcileProviderCalculationsJob spot-checked calculations and found a mismatch. Consent tier: essential.

events.name: Tax Real-time Preview Requested
events.description: POST /api/v1/tax/calculate real-time preview (does NOT persist a calculation record). Used by pricing pages + cart previews.

notes: Analytics NEVER carry raw tax_amount_cents / source_amount_cents / percentage — always bucketed. Prevents cross-tenant revenue inference from aggregated data.
Analytics NEVER carry certificate_number / certificate_document_url — those are RESTRICTED (financial-critical PII).
The 'essential' consent tier for Circuit Breaker Opened + Calculation Drift + Calculation Failed + Exemption Expired is deliberate — system-health + financial-audit signals cannot be opted out.

This file is DISTINCT from the tax-lane records. tax_calculations rows are financial records with 7-year retention; this analytics.json is the growth::analytics feed about the admin experience of managing the tax surface — a different lane, different consent, different retention.
